column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Clear , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column13: Took some signs of possible erosion along shore.  Not sure when this occured.
column14: FLOWTRACKER TIMES ARE 1 HOUR AND 10 MINUTES AHEAD, AND TIMES ARE ADJUSTED ACCORDINGLY.  EHSN NOTES SAYS, TIMES ARE ONLY 10 MINUTES AHEAD, BUT THAT IS NOT CORRECT. NOTE: THE FLOWTRACKER 2 FAILED THE "Automated beam check Noise level(cnts)" PORTION OF THE BEAM TEST PRIOR TO THE DISCHARGE MEASUREMENT. SONTEK (VIA HOSKINS) WAS NOTIFIED ABOUT THE FAILED TEST AND THEY SAID THEY AREN'T SURE WHAT IS CAUSING THE FAILED TEST, BUT THEY RESURED ME THAT THAT THE MEASURED VELOCITIES ARE FINE SINCE THE SNR VALUES ARE FINE.  AT THIS POINT THE DISCHARGE VALUES ARE CONSIDERED VALID, AND THE FLOWTRACKER UNIT IS GOING TO BE SENT IN TO BE ASSESSED.  ********************************************************************************************************************************** TWO discharge measurements (Confirmation for SP who is learning to do waders).  SP measured 1.12 cms, and TM measured 1.21 cms. Flowtracker tmes are 10 minutes fast. Times were adjusted accordingly. @ Uncertainty: IVE method, 2-sigma value (2 x Uncertainty Value reported in *.ft File). @ Note: Last visit might have had a bad survey/ reset.  Last visit, WL was ~0.030m higher than logger, no there is a -0.030m reset. Also, there was a large rise and drop about a week ago, which could explain the large Reset. Mid-section

column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Cloudy , Moderate Snow , Calm Wind
column14: AFTER REVIEWING THE FILE,  A SINGLE PANEL HAD NEGATIVE FLOW THAT ACCOUNTED FOR 33% OF FLOW IN THE INCORRECT DIRECTION.  SINCE IT WAS UNDER ICE AND ON THE EDGE, I'M GUESSING THE PANEL WAS BEHIND A ROCK IN AN EDDY.  OVERALL, I ASSUME THIS PANEL IS MAKING THE DISCHARGE VALUE INCORRECT, SO I REMOVED THE PANEL.  TOTAL FLOW CHANGES FROM 0.026 CMS, TO 0.035 CMS.  NOTHING ELSE WAS CHANGED.  ***********************************************************************************************************************************  Dish on auger flighting broke (no spare), so could not auger any more holes. MMT. not to standard.  Probably could not insert anymore panels even if auger was working. @ Uncertainty: IVE method, 2-sigma value (2 x Uncertainty Value reported in *.ft File). @ Could not return to RP, so used logger readings for SRC. Mid-section
